---
title: "coordinator.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\coordinator.py"
loc: 49
complexity: 4
logic_score: 7.82
style_score: 3.61
intel_score: 4.67
overall_score: 3.78
---

## Intent
The `coordinator.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on MissionCoordinator, __init__, select_mission, _legacy_sort. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via MissionCoordinator, __init__, select_mission, _legacy_sort. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 18 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [uuid](file://uuid)

### Exports
- `MissionCoordinator`
- `__init__`
- `select_mission`
- `_legacy_sort`
